channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Extension: Trump Delays Ban for 75 Days - The Latest Developments
item.description: President Donald Trump has signed an executive order to extend the deadline for TikTok's divestment from China, delaying the ban by 75 days. This move comes as the president seeks to negotiate a deal to keep the social media platform running in the US.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok deal pulled after Trump tariff announcement
item.description: A finalized TikTok deal was pulled Thursday after President Trump announced massive new tariffs against China, a source familiar with the negotiations told The Hill. Trump was poised to sign an executive order approving a deal that would have seen TikTok’s U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Pro-Palestinian protesters interrupt Microsoft's 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: Pro-Palestinian protesters interrupted Microsoft’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TikTok deal pulled after Trump tariff announcement
item.description: A finalized TikTok deal was pulled Thursday after President Trump announced massive new tariffs against China, a source familiar with the negotiations told The Hill. Trump was poised to sign an executive order approving a deal that would have seen TikTok’s U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Trump administration rolls back forest protections in bid to ramp up logging
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has rolled back environmental protections around future logging projects on more than half of U.S. national forests under an emergency designation issued Friday that cites the dangers of wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump to give TikTok another 75-day extension
item.description: President Trump said Friday that he plans to give TikTok another 75-day extension as his administration nears a deal to avert a ban on the popular social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: A man appearing before a New York court got a scolding from a judge after he tried to use an avatar generated by artificial intelligence to argue his case.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How this former Disney Imagineer is shaping the next generation of defense technology
item.description: The way Bran Ferren sees it, the future of warfare depends as much on creativity as it does on raw firepower.
item.dc:creator: Jared Keller, Fast Company

item.title: How AI is steering the media toward a ‘close enough’ standard
item.description: The nonstop cavalcade of announcements in the AI world has created a kind of reality distortion field. There is so much buzz, and even more money, circulating in the industry that it feels almost sacrilegious to doubt that AI will make good on its promises to change the world.
item.dc:creator: Pete Pachal, Fast Company

item.title: Canon EOS R7 Mark II rumored for 2025 with these significant upgrades – watch out Fujifilm
item.description: Rumors suggest that Canon will announced a replacement for the EOS R7 later this year, with a 40MP sensor among the upgrades.
item.dc:creator: christian.rowlands@me.com (Chris Rowlands), TechRadar

item.title: The iPad mini could be the next Apple tablet to get an OLED display – and I think that makes perfect sense
item.description: A new rumor suggests the iPad mini could be getting an OLED display with its next generation, becoming the second iPad to get the upgrade after the iPad Pro – here's why I think that makes a lot of sense.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Are modern smartphone designs boring? We asked 1,500 people, and the results are damning
item.description: We asked 1,500 people whether they think modern smartphone designs are boring, and the results paint a pessimistic picture.
item.dc:creator: axel.metz@futurenet.com (Axel Metz), TechRadar

item.title: Detailed Google Pixel 10 camera specs have seemingly leaked, pointing to an extra lens and worse sensors
item.description: Big changes could be coming to the Pixel 10's cameras, while the Pixel 10 Pro and Pro XL might not see any changes at all.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump fires NSA director and deputy after Loomer meeting
item.description: The Trump administration has fired the director of the National Security Agency as well as his deputy, prompting outrage from congressional Democrats. Director Gen.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s new AI education initiatives offer hope for enterprise knowledge retention
item.description: Two of the biggest names in artificial intelligence are independently developing new AI tools that encourage learning, at a time when the technology has been criticized for dumbing down smart users in the enterprise and discouraging critical thinking.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to troubleshoot and reset Windows Update
item.description: Like it or not, those who use Windows Update to obtain and install updates, patches, and fixes will occasionally encounter issues. Sometimes, a specific update may not download. At other times, an update may fail to install. Every now and then, Windows Update (a.k.a.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Marvel Rivals Season 2 release date, Emma Frost, and upcoming changes
item.description: Here's when to expect Marvel Rivals Season 2, as well as some info on the new Heroes Emma Frost and Ultron. Also, a look at upcoming changes to Team Ups.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Many CIOs operate within a culture of fear
item.description: Many IT leaders say they work in organizations that operate with a culture of blame, making it difficult to admit mistakes and then learn from errors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Explorando la confluencia de la tecnología y la sostenibilidad para un futuro mejor
item.description: Los esfuerzos de sostenibilidad están cobrando fuerza a escala mundial, y los gobiernos y las organizaciones están poniendo todo su empeño en la formulación y aplicación de políticas que puedan detener o incluso revertir el daño medioambiental global y crear un impacto positivo para las comunidades
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok Notes is shutting down as Lemon8 steps in
item.description: TikTok is shutting down TikTok Notes—wait, you didn’t even know it existed? Well, that explains a lot. TikTok Notes, the platform’s short-lived attempt to take on Instagram (just as Instagram Reels was built to mimic TikTok), is officially being retired.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon and OnlyFans founder place bids on TikTok ahead of imminent deadline for a U.S. buyer
item.description: As the weekend deadline for TikTok to find a buyer approaches, bidders for the short-video social media site are piling up. Amazon and, separately, a consortium led by OnlyFans founder Tim Stokely are the latest to throw their hats into the ring for TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Rust language adds trait upcasting
item.description: The Rust team has announced Rust 1.86, an update of the language that now features trait upcasting, or the ability to upcast trait objects. Rust 1.86 was announced April 3.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to accelerate digital transformation
item.description: Readers of CIO, Computerworld, CSO, InfoWorld, and Network World this week sought to learn how corporate culture can affect digital transformation, wanted to know more about the rise of cloud-based ERP, and had questions about desktop-based office software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Hyperlight Wasm points to the future of serverless
item.description: Back when I first wrote about Hyperlight, Microsoft’s minimal hypervisor, I speculated that it had a possible role as a WebAssembly-based alternative to serverless computing tools like Azure Functions, using Kubernetes as a host.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo’s Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era” where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Kryska, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Tumblr revival is real—and Gen Z is leading the charge
item.description: Rumors of a Tumblr comeback have been bubbling for a couple of years—think a pair of Doc Martens here, a splash of pastel hair dye there. Now, Gen Z is embracing the platform as a refuge from an internet saturated with influencers and algorithm fatigue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Humanoid robot stuns with perfect side-flip acrobatics
item.description: Unitree, a Chinese robotics company that developed a backflipping robot, has now introduced a humanoid robot capable of doing a side flip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge blocks social media age-verification law in Arkansas
item.description: A federal judge in Arkansas permanently blocked a law requiring age verification for social media accounts, deeming it unconstitutional. The law was stopped by U.S. District Judge Timothy L. Brooks of the Western District of Arkansas.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: GenAI is already transforming the healthcare industry
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is quickly transforming healthcare, according to a survey by consultancy McKinsey & Co. released today. The survey of 150 healthcare industry organizations found 85% are exploring or had already adopted genAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
